headline: TMX Transform Partners With Hasbro to Open New U.S. Distribution Center
summary: CLEVELAND, March 31, 2026--TMX Transform, a global supply chain consultancy, today announced its role in supporting a new distribution center in Midway, Ga. for Hasbro, a leading games, intellectual property (IP) and toy company. The facility strengthens Hasbro’s logistics network, helping ensure products are delivered with the speed and reliability partners and consumers expect.

headline: Hasbro opens distribution hub to cut costs, speed deliveries
summary: The Georgia facility will shrink the toymaker’s logistics network while adding resilience and efficiencies.
